name: premium-resume-studio
description: Autonomous premium-resume builder for anyone who wants a professional-yet-creative resume that stands out. Auto-classifies the archetype (executive / academic / fresher / technical / general), researches the person, renders a CEO-grade PDF via HTML+CSS+Chromium, and iterates with a model council until the absolute score clears 85. Ships 9 themes, an ATS-safe text export, and a cover-letter draft.
